hero.title:
Ancient wisdom.

Precisely calculated.
hero.quote: Most astrologers tell you what they think your chart says. Your chart shows what is — to the arcsecond. We help you read it.
hero.subtitle: Vedic Jyotish isn't newspaper horoscopes. At the exact second of your birth, nine planets were at precise astronomical positions — permanently recorded, mathematically verifiable. Most people have never had those positions read honestly. Here, we do exactly that: classical Jyotish, in your language, with no pressure to buy anything.
hero.tagline: Your personal Vedic horoscope — accurate, honest, in your language
hero.note: No signup required · Free daily readings · Six Indian languages

science.label: The Foundation
science.title:
Jyotish is not belief.

It is astronomy.
science.intro: Tell any astronomer your exact date, time, and place of birth — they can calculate where every planet was at that moment, to the arcsecond, using the same orbital mechanics that guides space probes. That precise astronomical data is what Jyotish works with. Five thousand years of careful observation, systematically correlating planetary positions with human experience. Not symbolism. Observed patterns.

planets.title: Planetary positions are mathematical facts
planets.body: Every planet's position at your birth is calculable from any point in time — past or future. The same mathematics that predicts eclipses centuries in advance calculates your birth chart to the exact degree. This is not opinion. This is measurement.

snapshot.title: Your chart is unique to the minute
snapshot.body: Your horoscope is unique to your birthplace and the exact minute you arrived. Two people born five minutes apart in different cities will have meaningfully different charts — different house placements, potentially different rising signs, different planetary periods. The precision of the chart is the precision of the sky.

framework.title: Interpretation follows a consistent structure
framework.body: Nine grahas (planets) each govern specific domains of life — mind, family, career, relationships, health, and wealth. Each rashi (sign) shapes how a planet's energy expresses. Each of the twelve bhavas (houses) maps a life area. Classical Jyotish applies this framework consistently — not intuitively, not with guesswork.

dasha.title: Your life phases are time-coded
dasha.body: The Vimshottari dasha system divides your life into planetary periods, each calculated from the exact degree of your Moon's nakshatra at birth. Your entire dasha sequence is mathematical. When people see their dasha timeline for the first time, they often recognise the turning points immediately: 'That's exactly when everything shifted.'

comparison.label: Why Taara Jyotishyam
comparison.title:
An honest reading,

without the sales pitch.
comparison.intro: If you've visited a traditional astrologer, you've likely encountered at least one of these: a vague reading that could describe anyone, a dosha warning followed by a ₹2,000 remedy recommendation, or predictions that shifted depending on what you seemed willing to spend. Taara Jyotishyam works differently — because it must. The chart is calculated precisely, and the reading follows only from that chart. No mood, no bias, no upselling.

availability.traditional: In-person visit, appointment, days of waiting
availability.taaraa: At home, right now — no appointment needed

neutrality.taaraa: Your chart only — a calm, unbiased reading

upselling.traditional: Often pushed — rituals, gemstones, costly add-ons

accuracy.taaraa: Lahiri sidereal — precise to the arcsecond

language.taaraa: English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Telugu & Tamil

cost.taaraa: ₹100 per reading — clear pricing, nothing extra

process.label: How it works
process.title:
Three steps.

Your chart in minutes.
process.intro: No account, no appointment, no back-and-forth. Enter your birth details — date, time, and place — and your chart is calculated immediately using Lahiri sidereal astronomy, the standard of classical Indian astrology.

birth.title: Enter your birth details
birth.body: Date, time, and place of birth — that's all. An accurate birth time gives you a precise lagna (rising sign) and house placements, the most personal parts of your chart. Even an approximate time gives you meaningful information.

calculate.title: We calculate your chart
calculate.body: Your chart is built using the Lahiri ayanamsa — the sidereal standard recognised in classical Jyotish and validated against modern astronomical data. Every planet's degree, nakshatra, and pada is calculated precisely.

read.title: Read your interpretation
read.body: Classical Jyotish principles are applied to your exact planetary positions — not to your sun sign, not to a generic Moon sign profile. You receive a reading specific to your chart, in plain language, in the language you choose.

readings.label: What You Get
readings.title:
Three readings,

from your exact chart.
readings.intro: Not your newspaper sun sign. Not a generic Moon sign forecast. Your actual Vedic chart — nine planetary positions, twelve houses, and the dasha period active in your life right now — read with the precision of classical Jyotish.

personality.title: Personality
personality.body: Your lagna (ascendant) describes how you present to the world. Your Moon sign reveals your emotional inner life and instinctive reactions. This reading explains how these two interact in your specific chart — your natural strengths, recurring patterns, how others first perceive you, and the temperament you were born with. Specific to your chart, not just your zodiac sign.

career.title: Career & Dharma
career.body: The 10th bhava and its ruling planet reveal the kind of work that energises you — environments, roles, and working styles that align with your chart rather than fight it. This reading also draws from your current dasha period for timing: what is being activated professionally right now, and what the next phase may bring.

dasha.title: Current Dasha
dasha.body: Your Vimshottari dasha and antardasha — the planetary period and sub-period governing your current life chapter — shape your energy, relationships, opportunities, and inner shifts. This reading names your exact dasha, explains what these planets activate in your natal chart, and gives an honest picture of the next 12–18 months.

one.quote: The reading described my personality so precisely that I shared it with my family immediately. Reading it in Telugu — my actual language — made it feel real, not translated.
one.name: Lakshmi P. · Hyderabad

two.quote: Every astrologer I've visited wanted to sell me something after the reading. Here I got a more honest personality reading than all of them — for ₹100, with nothing pushed afterward.
two.name: Ravi K. · Vijayawada

three.quote: The dasha reading named the exact period when my career changed. I came in sceptical and left genuinely impressed — specific to my chart, no vague predictions.
three.name: Preethi M. · Bengaluru

match.label: Horoscope matching
match.title:
Marriage compatibility,

precisely scored.
match.intro: The Ashtakoot system scores compatibility across eight dimensions of human life — from innate temperament and emotional rapport, to physical harmony, family prosperity, and health themes. All 36 points are calculated from both birth charts using classical weightings. The result is a specific, honest read on how your charts interact — not a vague 'are you compatible?' verdict.
match.roleHint: Important: enter the bride's birth details on the left and the groom's on the right. The Ashtakoot method scores directionally (bride vs groom), so switching sides will change the result.
match.limitReached: Daily comparison limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
match.genericError: Could not compare charts. Please try again.
match.reportHint: A thorough, warm reading of your compatibility — what the scores reveal about your natural strengths together, which kootas deserve honest discussion, and what both charts suggest about the life you would build.
match.reportUnavailable: Match readings are not available right now.
match.reportEmpty: No reading was returned. Please try again.
match.disclaimer: Ashtakoot compatibility is traditional guidance, not a verdict on your relationship. For reflection and self-understanding only.

mangal.none: No Mangal dosha concern for this pair.
mangal.present: One chart shows Mangal dosha — classical texts note several exceptions and cancellations; worth understanding together.
mangal.cancelled: Both charts show Mangal dosha — traditionally this cancels out for the pair.

qa.title: Ask about your match
qa.subtitle: Follow-up questions grounded in your compatibility score and both charts — not generic advice.
qa.unavailable: Match Q&A is not available right now.
qa.limitReached: Daily question limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
qa.empty: Ask about any koota, Mangal dosha, family themes, or what your score means for you two.
qa.placeholder: e.g. Why is our Bhakoot score low, and should we worry?
qa.genericError: Could not get an answer. Please try again.
qa.emptyReply: No answer was returned. Please try again.
qa.disclaimer: Answers are for guidance and reflection only. Not medical, legal, or financial advice.
